title: campanula tridentata var. ciliata
intro: Campanula tridentata var. ciliata, also known as the fringed bellflower, is a flowering plant belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting respiratory health. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in alleviating symptoms of coughs, colds, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Campanula tridentata var. ciliata, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made by steeping the plant's parts in hot water to harness its medicinal benefits.
